site.title: Aux — Your weekly music club
site.description: Your weekly music club. Share songs, vote favorites, crown the DJ.
hero.subtitle: Create a group, invite your friends, and discover who has the best music taste. Works with Spotify, YouTube Music, and more.
features.crossPlatform.title: Cross-platform
features.crossPlatform.desc: Paste a Spotify or YouTube link. We resolve it for every platform automatically.
features.rate.title: Rate & vote
features.rate.desc: Rate your friends' picks from 0 to 5 stars. Half stars allowed — be precise.
features.rankings.title: Weekly rankings
features.rankings.desc: See who brought the best tracks this round. All-time leaderboard included.
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1.title: Create a group
howItWorks.step1.desc: Name it, get a shareable link.
howItWorks.step2.title: Share the link
howItWorks.step2.desc: Friends join with just a name. No signup.
howItWorks.step3.title: Drop your tracks
howItWorks.step3.desc: Paste Spotify or YouTube links each round.
howItWorks.step4.title: Vote & compete
create.title: Create a group
create.error.exists: A group with that name already exists. Try a different one.
create.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
join.title: Join this group
join.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
